name: Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia phase 1 registry
summary: Single-arm phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry of intravenous AAV-hTERT for critical limb ischemia, with adverse events as the primary outcome and no posted results.
population: Estimated 5 adults aged 45 years or older with critical limb ischemia

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed estimated primary and study completion in December 2020, but had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Disease-context AAV-hTERT registry, not broad aging evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The registry helps define the AAV-hTERT boundary: even disease-specific human gene-therapy records remain no-results and cannot support benefit or safety claims.
